title: Add Numbers Column Automation for Budgeting
excerpt: On the automation “when status changes to x, increase or decrease number by VALUE” it would be AMAZING to be able to plug in another numbers column instead of a manual value. Then you’d be able to tally budgets without h…

posts.author: victoriaw (Victoria Weible)
posts.cookedHtml: On the automation “when status changes to x, increase or decrease number by VALUE” it would be AMAZING to be able to plug in another numbers column instead of a manual value. Then you’d be able to tally budgets without having to manually do the math because the value is often not static.
